submissions.promptSummary: Build a Fashion e-commerce website for 'Sample Shop' in Ahmedabad, Gujarat. Required pages: Home, Products, Contact. Features: Google Maps, Social Media. Budget: ₹5,000–₹10,000. Timeline: 7-14 days. Additional: Need WhatsApp integration and basic SEO.
